title: AI firms flex lobbying muscle on both side of Atlantic
summary: AI companies are spending heavily to shape new regulations in Europe and the United States. They are also engaging the public, promoting AI as a force for good. This push comes as governments grapple with the powerful technology's future impact on jobs and society.

title: AI united Sam Altman and Elon Musk, then drove them apart
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman, co-founders of OpenAI, are set to face off in court over a clash of visions regarding artificial intelligence.
